details.response_behavior: ChatGPT responded normally with AI content about privacy - no Etap warning displayed
details.chatgpt_response_summary: 그건 내가 확인하거나 조회해줄 수 있는 정보가 아니야. 주민등록번호 같은 개인정보는 본인만 안전하게 보관하고 공식 기관을 통해 확인해야 해.

network_analysis.note: ChatGPT uses 'backend-api/conversation' (singular) - filter 'conversations' may not match. But 0 matching means no conversation API call captured or different endpoint used.

details.previous_status: DONE (Phase 4 완료) - 경고 표시 성공 (Strategy C)

diagnosis: REGRESSION DETECTED. ChatGPT was previously confirmed working with Strategy C warning, but now shows no warning. Possible causes: (1) Not logged in - guest mode may use different API endpoint not intercepted by Etap, (2) ChatGPT updated its API routing, (3) Etap configuration change. Recommend: retry with logged-in session to confirm.
